title: Op-Commands
body:
# **This mod adds commands to Minecraft to help you in your game:**

**Commands:**

/gmc {selector} > Sets game mode to creative

/gms {selector} > Sets game mode to survival

/gma {selector} > Sets game mode to adventure

/gmsp {selector} > Sets game mode to spectator

/day > Sets the day

/night > Sets the night

/ng {selector} > Gives Night Vision

/message {text} > Send a message in the chat

/feed {selector} > Fills the food

/heal {selector} > Fills life

/dmg {selector} > Deals damage

/rename {selector} > Rename entities

/killitems > Kills all items

/spawn {mob} {number} > Spawns mobs by number

/tpdimensions {selector} {dimension} > Teleports players to a dimension

/speed {selector} {power} > Gives speed

/height {number} > Teleport higher

/vanish > Makes the player invisible

/kill allmobs > Kills all entities except players

/kill mobs {mob} > Kills a specific entity

/onfire {selector} {time} > Sets the target on fire

/boom {selector} > Creates an explosion on the target

/anvil {selector} > Drops an anvil on the target

/thunder {selector} > Strikes lightning on the target

/cobweb {selector} > Traps the target in cobwebs

/freeze {selector} > Freezes the target in place

/unfreeze {selector} > Removes freeze effects

/gravity {selector} {power} {time} > Changes the gravity on the target

/tphere {selector} > Teleports a target to you

/tprandom {selector} {number} > Teleports the target to a random location

/mount {selector} {selector} > Makes the target ride another entity

/god {selector} >Makes the player invincible

/fly > Allows flight in survival mode

/clearweather > Remove the rain

/sethome {home name} > Adds a home to the player's position

/home {home name} > Teleport home

/delhome {home name} > Delete a home

/listhome > Give the list of homes


## Mod translated into: 
English, French, Italian, Spanish, German

## Supported Minecraft versions:

- Forge: 1.20.1 (actively maintained), 1.16.5 (legacy, no longer updated)
- NeoForge: 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8 (actively maintained)
- Fabric: 1.20.1 (actively maintained)


## Warning:
The commands:

/tprandom, /home, /sethome, /delhome, and /listhome are not available in Fabric 1.20.1
